package rulecoverage

func NegativeGzipOrZipWriterCreatedPerChunk() string {
    ruleID := "gzip_or_zip_writer_created_per_chunk"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Gzip or zip writers recreated per chunk inside handler loops instead of reusing per stream."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
